headline: Is It Time To Reassess ADP (ADP) After Its Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether Automatic Data Processing (ADP) is attractively priced at its current level, the starting point is to separate headline share moves from underlying value. ADP recently closed at US$209.73, with returns of 3.0% over 3 years and 26.8% over 5 years, but a 17.1% decline year to date and a 27.3% decline over the last year highlight a clear shift in how the market is currently pricing the stock. Recent coverage of ADP has focused on its role as a core payroll and HR...

headline: Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Give Their Take On 3 Industrials Stocks Delivering High-Dividend Yields
summary: Benzinga analyzes dividend-yielding stocks with high free cash flows and accurate analyst ratings. ADP and PBI have positive news and high yields.
